overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment. The clip transitions from a sunny commercial sidewalk with neon food vendors into a covered underpass with orange structural beams and artificial lighting, then continues through the underpass past various shops and digital billboards toward a bright exit.

events.description: camera passes close to purple neon food stall, temporarily blocking view of the street
slight turn to follow pedestrian path around vendor area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sunny sidewalk past the neon-lit food stall

notable_agents.action: vendor working at the purple neon food stall with Japanese paper lanterns
pedestrian wearing yellow pants walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: food vendor stall with glowing purple neon trim and Japanese paper lanterns
tall building with blue neon HOTEL signage
tall palm tree lining the sidewalk
orange metal guard rails separating sidewalk from street
tall futuristic glass building reflecting sunlight

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit commercial sidewalk lined with palm trees and orange guard rails. A purple neon food stall with Japanese lanterns occupies the left side while a blue neon hotel sign glows on a distant building to the right. The camera passes the vendor and follows a pedestrian ahead toward a large overpass structure in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway entrance with concrete stairs

events.description: entering the covered underpass structure, transitioning from open street to sheltered walkway
moving from bright sunlight into shadow under the overpass, artificial lights become visible

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass structure and approaching the concrete stairs on the right

notable_agents.action: character in red pants and black jacket walking ahead into the covered area

entered.detail: large metal overpass with orange structural beams creating a roof over the walkway
flight of concrete stairs leading up to the overpass level
orange painted steel support beams forming a geometric pattern overhead

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered underpass area, transitioning from bright sunlight to mixed lighting under the orange metal structure. Concrete stairs lead upward on the right while parked cars line the left side. The pedestrian ahead continues walking deeper into the sheltered walkway as natural light fades and artificial lighting becomes prominent.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban walkway with traffic barriers and overhead lighting

events.description: cars passing by on the left side behind green traffic barriers
approaching yellow zebra crossing painted on the walkway floor

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered passage with orange structural beams and neon overhead lights

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red hat and blue top walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: green metal barriers separating the pedestrian walkway from the vehicle lane
long fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the ceiling beams
large cylindrical concrete support pillars along the right side
yellow painted zebra crossing stripes on the concrete floor

segments.scene_description: Deep within the covered underpass, the character walks beneath orange structural beams illuminated by overhead neon lights. Green traffic barriers line the left side where cars pass by, while concrete pillars support the structure on the right. The camera approaches and crosses a yellow zebra crossing as various pedestrians walk in both directions through the artificially lit corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial underpass with neon shops and digital billboards approaching exit

events.description: approaching the bright exit of the underpass, natural light visible ahead
passing by brightly lit shop fronts with neon signs and digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: continuing through the underpass toward the bright exit, passing various pedestrians and shops

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white top and dark pants walking ahead toward the exit

entered.detail: corner shop with bright neon signage reading CHANG
large digital billboard displaying REAL WATER advertisement with a man's face
bright natural light streaming in from the end of the underpass tunnel
escalator or stairway structure visible on the left side near the exit
shop with purple neon TENGU signage

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the end of the underpass where bright natural light streams in from the exit. Various commercial establishments line the right side including a shop with neon CHANG signage and another with purple TENGU lettering. A large digital billboard for REAL WATER dominates the left wall. The orange structural beams recede into the distance as the camera moves toward the illuminated exit, passing other pedestrians heading in the same direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit commercial sidewalk into a sheltered urban underpass that eventually opens back into the bright city light. It begins by following a pedestrian past palm trees and a purple neon food stall under a clear sky, moving steadily toward a looming overpass structure. As the character enters the covered area, the bright sunlight fades into a mix of artificial glow and shadow beneath orange metal beams, passing concrete stairs and parked cars. The scene then deepens into a corridor of neon lights and concrete pillars, crossing a yellow zebra crossing amidst a flow of pedestrians and passing traffic. Finally, the camera moves past digital billboards and neon shop signs as the orange structure recedes, heading toward the brilliant natural light streaming from the exit.
